reference: I am nineteen years old and my boyfriend is twenty-one. We had sexual intercourse on the 6th of March; he did not release sperm inside. We had sexual intercourse again on the 8th, and he ejaculated inside knowingly. Within one to two hours, I took an emergency contraceptive pill. My expected period date is on the 14th, and today is the 15th. I am really very tense. Am I pregnant? Because after taking the pill, I also had no bleeding, and I am more tense that due to taking more and more tension, my periods are prolonged. Please help me, doctor.
text: I am nineteen years old and my boyfriend is twenty-one. We had sexual intercourse on the sixth of March. He did not release sperm inside. We had sexual intercourse again on the eighth, and he ejaculated inside knowingly. Within one to two hours, I took an emergency contraceptive pill. My expected period date is on the fourth, and today is the fifteenth. I am really very tense and my pregnant because after taking the pill, I also had no bleeding, and I am more tense that due to taking more and more tension. My periods are prolonged. Please help me, doctor.
